case_title: FIORE ANTHONY F DBA BUCKETS AND BROOMS VS BOSCOE HEDDA DBA 587 HAIR SALON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY FIORE ANTHONY F DBA BUCKETS AND BROOMS AS TO DEFENDANT BOSCOE HEDDA DBA 587 HAIR SALON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOSCOE HEDDA DBA 587 HAIR SALON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIORE ANTHONY F DBA BUCKETS AND BROOMS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOSCOE HEDDA DBA 587 HAIR SALON $605.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $633.00, DEFT TO PAY $633 IN CASE OR CASHIERS CHECK BY 12/21/91, DEFT HAS ACKNOWLEDGED LIAB FOR$633.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
